title: Sign in
intro: Use your account or an FNMT certificate to continue.
certificateHint: The secure certificate route will open. If the browser finds an installed FNMT certificate, it will show its native selector.
certificateUnavailable: FNMT certificate access is only available in a desktop browser.
errorSummaryIntro: Review the following information before continuing.
formReady: Validation passed. Connect this form to your secure backend to continue.
authErrorGeneric: We could not complete the sign-in process. Try again.
authSignedOut: Your session has ended. Sign in again to continue.
certMissing: No certificate was selected. Choose an FNMT certificate to continue.
certRejected: The selected certificate could not be validated.
certTimeout: The certificate flow took too long. Start again.
support: If you need help, contact technical support.
